title: Rainbow XP Bar
description: Rainbow XP Progress Bar is a vibrant texture pack designed to make your Minecraft XP bar more visually appealing with a stunning RGB (rainbow) effect.
body:
![Xp bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/426091e52b3fc519182c26b8b489e18bdf4cc0c8.png)

**Rainbow XP Progress Bar** is a vibrant texture pack designed to make your Minecraft XP bar more visually appealing with a stunning RGB (rainbow) effect. Say goodbye to the plain old green bar and enjoy a dynamic, colorful experience every time you gain experience points.

Transforms the XP bar into a beautiful, continuously changing rainbow of colors.
Adds a visually exciting element to your gameplay.
Easy to install and compatible with other texture packs.
How to Install:

- Download the texture pack file from CurseForge.
- Open Minecraft and go to the resource packs menu.
- Click on "Open Pack Folder" and move the downloaded file into this folder.
- Return to Minecraft and activate the Rainbow XP Progress Bar texture pack.
- Enjoy a more colorful and lively Minecraft adventure with the Rainbow XP Progress Bar!

## Ajude Com qualquer Quantia ( Não Reenbolsável )
## [Livepix](https://livepix.gg/heycronus)
